title: Create : Beyond Limits
description: A Create Addon made By Axell_2D
body:
--- ## Overview Create: Beyond Limits builds on Create’s automation philosophy by introducing new ways to interact with the world. From resource processing to soul-based mechanics, the mod focuses on meaningful progression and systems that reward planning and experimentation. --- ## Development Status
Important Information - **v1.5.0 — The Sprinkled Update:** Integrates fluid logistics and kinetic power grids through specialized components, introducing the Fluid Sprinkler, Mechanical Rotary Joint, and Mechanical Rotary Union. - **v1.0.0 — The Neoforgification Update:** Complete migration to NeoForge 1.21.1. Support for Forge 1.20.1 is now officially deprecated.
--- ## Version Requirements > **Note:** Support for Forge 1.20.1 has ended to focus exclusively on NeoForge 1.21.1 and the latest Create versions. - **Create:** `6.0.8+` - **Dependencies (for v0.9.0 and below):** Create, Farmer's Delight, and GeckoLib are required for legacy versions. --- ## Installation Requirements (v1.0.0+)
| Mod Loader | Required Dependency | | :--- | :--- | |
NeoForge (1.21.1) |
Create 6.0.8+ |
--- ## Notes - v1.0.0+ (including v1.5.0) requires NeoForge 1.21.1. Legacy versions (v0.9.0 and below) remain on Forge 1.20.1. - New specialized blocks feature integrated item hover summaries accessible by holding **[Shift]** in the inventory layout. - Additional progression systems and features are planned for future updates.
